notes: v0.1 → v1.0 code-complete in this push. Items marked done include features whose schema, RLS, Edge Function code, and client UI are all shipped to main. Items marked 'blocked' need an external action: API keys, Cornell BirdNET license, ML model training, Apple Developer account, Cloudflare R2 account + DNS, etc. Phases v1.5–v2.5 remain unchanged from prior plan. | 2026-04-25: First real user onboarding session (Eugenio Padilla). 10 bugs found and fixed, 5 new modules designed. Module 14 (User API Tokens) shipped. WebLLM set as default fallback. Identification block added to obs form.
notes_es: v0.1 → v1.0 código completo en este push. Los ítems marcados como done incluyen funcionalidades cuyo schema, RLS, Edge Function y UI ya están desplegados en main. Los ítems marcados como 'blocked' requieren una acción externa: API keys, licencia comercial de BirdNET, entrenamiento ML, cuenta Apple Developer, DNS de Cloudflare R2, etc. Las fases v1.5–v2.5 no cambian respecto al plan anterior.

governance_track.name: Governance & sovereignty (parallel to all product phases)
governance_track.name_es: Gobernanza y soberanía (paralelo a todas las fases del producto)
governance_track.notes: Governance work runs continuously alongside the product roadmap. Milestones have no shipping date — they complete when community consent + legal review land.
governance_track.notes_es: El trabajo de gobernanza corre en paralelo a todo el roadmap. Los hitos no tienen fecha de lanzamiento — se completan cuando aterrizan el consentimiento comunitario y la revisión legal.

external_actions_required: supabase functions deploy identify (with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + PLANTNET_API_KEY)
supabase functions deploy recompute-streaks (+ pg_cron schedule)
supabase functions deploy award-badges (+ pg_cron schedule)
Cloudflare R2 account + media.rastrum.app DNS for module 10 storage migration
BirdNET-Analyzer deployment behind a REST endpoint for v0.5 audio ID
GBIF publisher account for v0.5 DwC-A export
Apple Developer Program for v1.2 Capacitor iOS wrapper
ONNX model training pipeline for v0.3 base + v0.5 regional packs
supabase db push (run user_api_tokens migration from docs/specs/infra/supabase-schema.sql)
Set PUBLIC_PLANTNET_API_KEY in Cloudflare/Vercel env vars for client-side PlantNet calls
Configure custom OAuth domain: Supabase Dashboard → Auth → Custom Domains → auth.rastrum.artemiop.com
